component.name: Edit Job, Session
component.description: Handle, Back, session header (16px Brand/Accent clock + Title-H3 тАЬEdit SessionтАЭ) with Start/End Time labels and four body inputs тАФ or job header (тАЬEdit JobтАЭ) with stacked fields; footer: **Button** (`1287:1563`) **Primary+Delete Job/Session** (`1808:1161`) тАФ **Brand/Accent** save + trash (`FieldSoloCtaButton` `jobSessionPrimaryWithDelete`).

figmaNamingNote: Figma **Edit Job** uses placeholder copy on inputs; **Edit Job Empty** shows the populated sample job row (`1286:701`). Code maps these to `editJobPlaceholder` and `editJobFilled` respectively.

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Edit Job, Session (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.content: edit-job-session-content (React; Figma stacks handle + body + job slot + footer in the sheet)
figmaLayerNames.body: edit-job-session-body (back + header + session fields when `Edit Session`)
figmaLayerNames.jobFields: edit-job-session-job-fields (Figma `SLOT` for job variants тАФ sits between body and footer)
figmaLayerNames.title: edit-job-session-title
figmaLayerNames.footer: edit-job-session-footer (wraps INSTANCE of Button Primary+Delete Job/Session `1808:1161`; nested `fieldsolo-cta-*` layers from `1287:1563`)

primaryCta.fill: Brand/Accent on primary; shadow from Brand/Primary per `fieldsolo-cta/spec.json`

codeProps.job: optional Partial<EditJobFormValues>; merged with per-variant defaults
codeProps.children: optional; replaces default job field stack for editJob*

notes: 2026-04-07: `EditJobSessionBottomSheet` mirrors handle, Back, headers, field shells, and SAVE + delete footer per Figma `1284:789`.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `1284:789` тАФ `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Structural frames renamed to `edit-job-session-*` (surface, handle, body, session fields, job slot, footer, back, header, title icon/text, session inputs, primary/delete). `Edit Session` nests date/time fields under `edit-job-session-body`; job variants use `edit-job-session-job-fields` (`SLOT` in Figma) between body and footer. React uses `data-name` on the same hooks; `edit-job-session-content` wraps padded stack. No `flatten()` in automation.

2026-04-08: Footer rebuilt: `edit-job-session-footer` contains an INSTANCE of **Button** **Primary+Delete Job/Session** (`1808:1161`) from set `1287:1563` (child named `edit-job-session-footer-cta`). React: `FieldSoloCtaButton` `jobSessionPrimaryWithDelete`.
